targets.rawSql: SELECT total_sleep_h AS "Gesamtschlaf (h)" FROM sleep_sessions ORDER BY sleep_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT deep_h AS "Tiefschlaf (h)" FROM sleep_sessions ORDER BY sleep_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT avg AS "HRV (ms)" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'heart_rate_variability' ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT sleep_date AS time, deep_h AS "Tiefschlaf" FROM sleep_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(sleep_date::timestamptz) ORDER BY sleep_date
SELECT sleep_date AS time, core_h AS "Kernschlaf" FROM sleep_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(sleep_date::timestamptz) ORDER BY sleep_date
SELECT sleep_date AS time, rem_h AS "REM" FROM sleep_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(sleep_date::timestamptz) ORDER BY sleep_date
SELECT sleep_date AS time, awake_h AS "Wach" FROM sleep_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(sleep_date::timestamptz) ORDER BY sleep_date
SELECT day AS time, avg AS "HRV (ms)" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'heart_rate_variability' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day
SELECT day AS time, vmin AS "Ruhepuls (bpm)" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'resting_heart_rate' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day
SELECT day AS time, sum AS "Schritte" FROM daily_metrics WHERE metric = 'step_count' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamptz) ORDER BY day

SELECT ref_date AS "Datum", kind AS "Art", metric_a AS "Metrik", ROUND(severity::numeric,2) AS "Schweregrad" FROM findings WHERE kind IN ('anomaly','recovery_alert') AND ref_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' ORDER BY ref_date DESC
